zh.lifeSummary: 當Avena de Holland於1274年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，她的父親Sir Robert de Holand II29歲，母親Elizabeth de Salmesbury19歲。她於大約1289年與Lord Adam Ireland在英國英格蘭藍卡爾赫頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1326年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avena de Holland于1274年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Holand II29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Salmesbury19岁。她于大约1289年与Lord Adam Ireland在英国英格兰藍卡爾赫頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1326年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Avena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

variants.name: Aveni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

en.lifeSummary: When Avena de Holland was born in 1274, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Holand II, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, was 19. She married Lord Adam Ireland about 1289, in Hutton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1326, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avena de Holland est née en 1274, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Holand II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Adam Ireland environ 1289, à Hutton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avena de Holland 1274 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Holand II 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Salmesbury 19. Sie hat um 1289 in Hutton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lord Adam Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avena de Holland è nata il nel 1274 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert de Holand II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Lord Adam Ireland circa 1289, nel Hutton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Avena de Hollandが1274年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Holand IIは29歳，母Elizabeth de Salmesburyは19歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアハットオンでLord Adam Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1326年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avena de Holland(이)가 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Holand II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Salmesbury(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 후턴에서 Lord Adam Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Lord Adam Ireland aproximadamente 1289, em Hutton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avena de Holland родилась в 1274 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Holand II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Salmesbury, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Adam Ireland около 1289 г. в местности хуттон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1326 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.
